# stripe_product_feature (Resource)

A product feature represents an attachment between a Stripe product and an entitlements feature. When the product is purchased, Stripe creates an active entitlement to the feature for the customer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stripe_product" "growth" {
  name = "Growth"
}

resource "stripe_entitlements_feature" "api_access" {
  lookup_key = "api_access"
  name       = "API access"
}

resource "stripe_product_feature" "growth_api_access" {
  product             = stripe_product.growth.id
  entitlement_feature = stripe_entitlements_feature.api_access.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entitlement_feature` (String) The ID of the entitlements feature to attach to the product.
- `product` (String) The ID of the product to attach the feature to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import stripe_product_feature.growth_api_access prod_123/pftr_123
```
